chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 100 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.936/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.937/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on MA No.938/2023 (Stay/A) 10.02.2023 Mr. Shamsuddin Rajper, Advocate for the applicants..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency application is allowed. 2 to 4. Learned Counsel for the applicants, after arguing the matter at some length, seeks disposal of this Criminal Miscellaneous Application by directing to S.H.O. and I.O. concerned not to make any arrest pursuant to F.I.R. if lodged by respondent No.4 in view of the impugned order dated 08.02.2023 passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Pano Akil in Cr. Misc. Appln. No.291 of 2023, without collecting tangible evidence. Order accordingly. Office is directed to communicate this order to respondent No.3 (S.H.O, Police Station Cantonment, Pano Akil, District Sukkur) for compliance. The Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
